home.setupFarmHint: Tell Lima your crops and soil for advice made for you.
home.needsLastWateredHint: Tell us when you last watered or had a good soaking rain so Lima can give a real recommendation.
home.quickLogHint: Quick log saves a simple record for rain, watering, or harvest. Use the detailed entry for dates, notes, and CSV export.

advice.title: Should I water?
advice.skipRainReason: About {{mm}} mm of rain is expected in the next 2 days, enough to cover your soil's need.
advice.irrigateReason: Your {{crop}} has used the water stored in the soil ({{deficit}} mm gone) and rain won't cover it in time.
advice.waitReason: The soil still holds enough water for your {{crop}}. Check again in {{days}}.
advice.basedOn: Based on your farm profile and the forecast

weather.title: Weather
weather.radarNote: Radar coverage is limited in some regions.
weather.gpsDenied: Could not get your location. Pick a place below.

data.title: Your data
data.noDataHint: Log rain, watering and harvests from the Home screen and they will appear here.

irrigation.title: Irrigation planner
irrigation.subtitle: A simple water budget for your field
irrigation.assumptions: Uses a simple daily water budget: crop use (ET₀ × Kc) minus effective rain, compared to what your soil can hold. It is guidance, not a guarantee — always check your soil by hand too.
irrigation.needsLastWatered: Add your last watering date first
irrigation.needsLastWateredHint: Lima needs to know when the soil was last watered or soaked by rain before it can estimate the next irrigation.

calendar.title: Season calendar
calendar.noCrops: No crops in your profile yet
calendar.recommendation: A good planting window for {{crop}} is around {{date}}.

records.title: Records
records.emptyHint: Two taps is all it takes — log rain, watering or a harvest.
records.logGuide: Use quick log for fast entries or detailed entry for dates, notes, and CSV export.
records.notePlaceholder: Add a note for your records

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.welcome: Molo! I'm your farming helper. Ask me about watering, planting, pests or soil — type, speak, or send a photo of a sick plant.
assistant.demoNote: Demo reply — live assistant is unavailable
assistant.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser.
assistant.offlineNote: You are offline. The assistant needs a connection.
assistant.suggest1: When should I water my maize?
assistant.suggest2: How do I deal with pests?
assistant.suggest3: What can I plant this month?

settings.title: Settings
settings.sunlightHint: High contrast for reading in bright sun.
settings.threeDHint: Uses more battery and data. Off by default.
settings.dataSaverHint: Refresh weather less often and skip heavy visuals.
settings.alertsHint: Get a welcome message and alerts like “Don't irrigate — rain coming” on WhatsApp.
settings.scanWhatsappHint: Point your phone camera here to open WhatsApp and start chatting with your farming assistant.
settings.openWhatsapp: Or tap here to open WhatsApp
settings.alertsSimulated: Saved. Server is in simulation mode (no Twilio keys) — message logged, not sent.
settings.alertsNeedServer: Saved on this phone. SMS alerts start once the Lima server is running (see README).
settings.aboutBody: Lima helps farmers decide when to water and plant using the weather forecast. Works offline. Free weather data by Open-Meteo.
settings.resetConfirm: Delete profile, records and settings from this phone?

onboarding.welcomeBody: Weather-smart watering and planting advice for your farm — even when the signal is weak.
onboarding.orPickCity: or pick a place near you

tools.title: Farm tools
tools.indicativeNote: Indicative prices — always confirm at your local market.
tools.fertNote: General guidance for smallholder fields. A soil test gives the most accurate amounts.
tools.ledgerEmpty: No entries yet. Add your sales and costs to see profit.

stageTips.initial: Keep soil moist and weed early — young plants compete poorly with weeds.
stageTips.development: Top-dress with nitrogen and keep weeding. Scout for pests weekly.
stageTips.mid: Flowering/filling is the thirstiest stage — don't let the crop dry out, and watch for pests.
stageTips.late: Ripening — reduce watering and prepare for harvest and drying.

install.title: Add Lima to your home screen

tour.welcomeBody: This screen gives you the main weather and irrigation guidance for the day. Start here for quick decisions before you head to the field.
tour.adviceBody: The main card shows whether you should water now, wait, or skip because rain is likely.
tour.quickLogBody: Use quick log to save rain, watering, or harvest entries quickly when you are busy in the field.
tour.recordsBody: Your records build a history you can review later and export as a CSV file when you want to share or analyse them.
